style: Photorealistic portrait, soft natural studio lighting, shallow depth of field, warm and hopeful mood, centered head-and-shoulders, plain softly-blurred neutral background, high detail, editorial travel-brand quality, no text, no watermark.

characters.prompt: A 34-year-old French woman, Camille, seated in a sleek modern electric wheelchair, warm confident smile, short wavy brown hair, light makeup, wearing a stylish teal travel coat, holding a smartphone, looking hopeful and independent.
A 36-year-old French man, Julien, Camille's partner, kind reassuring expression, short dark hair, light stubble, casual navy sweater, looking gently toward camera.
A friendly airport special-assistance staff member in her 40s, professional airline uniform with a lanyard and headset, welcoming smile, standing in a bright modern airport terminal.
An elegant hotel receptionist in his 30s, tailored dark blazer with a name badge, polite professional smile, standing behind a warm-lit boutique hotel reception desk on the French Riviera.

avatars.prompt: A minimalist flat-vector avatar of a friendly AI travel assistant, glowing teal-to-violet gradient orb with a subtle circuit motif and a soft ring, centered on transparent background, modern app icon style, no face, no text.
